title: eleocharis glabella
intro: Eleocharis glabella is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family, commonly known as a type of spike-rush. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis glabella include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
